signemail-smtp-dns-diagnostic.description: WordPress SMTP + DNS Diagnostic plugin. Fixes emails landing in spam by configuring a professional SMTP server. Compatible with Gmail, Outlook, cPanel, OVH, Hostinger, SiteGround and all major hosts. Includes real-time SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS diagnostic via Cloudflare DoH. SMTP and DNS diagnostic are free forever; DKIM signing requires SignEmail Smtp Premium license from smtp-dkim.com.

tools.name: configure_smtp
tools.description: Configure SMTP server settings (host, port, SSL/TLS, credentials) for a WordPress site. Password is stored AES-256-CBC encrypted — never in plain text. Compatible with cPanel (mail.yourdomain.com), Gmail (smtp.gmail.com port 587), Outlook (smtp.office365.com port 587), OVH, Hostinger, SiteGround, GoDaddy, Infomaniak, Namecheap, BlueHost, DreamHost, 1&1 IONOS.

smtp_host.description: SMTP server hostname (e.g., mail.yourdomain.com, smtp.gmail.com, smtp.office365.com)

smtp_port.description: SMTP port: 465 for SSL, 587 for TLS/STARTTLS, 25 for none

smtp_user.description: SMTP username — usually the full email address

smtp_pass.description: SMTP password (will be encrypted with AES-256-CBC before storage)

from_email.description: Sender email address visible to recipients

force_from.description: Force this From address on all outgoing emails (WooCommerce, CF7, etc.)

tools.name: activate_dkim
tools.description: Activate DKIM RSA-2048 signing for a WordPress domain. Requires a valid SignEmail Smtp Premium license key from smtp-dkim.com. The DKIM private key is stored AES-256-CBC encrypted using WordPress SECURE_AUTH_KEY — it never leaves the server and is never transmitted to smtp-dkim.com.

domain.description: WordPress domain without www (e.g., example.com). Set this BEFORE activating the license to avoid www. detection issues.

license_key.description: SignEmail Smtp Premium license key from smtp-dkim.com (format: SDKM-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX)

dkim_private_key.description: RSA private key in PEM format from cPanel → Email Deliverability → DKIM → View → Private Key. Include full header/footer lines.

dkim_selector.description: DKIM selector (auto-detected from DNS when activating license — usually 'default')

tools.name: diagnose_dns
tools.description: Check SPF, DKIM public key, and DMARC DNS records for a domain via Cloudflare DoH (DNS-over-HTTPS). Returns record values, validation status, detected issues, and fix instructions for cPanel Zone Editor.

dkim_selector.description: DKIM selector to check (e.g., default, mail, smtp, s1, selector1)

tools.name: test_email
tools.description: Send a test email from WordPress. The email includes full SMTP config summary, DKIM signing status, DNS diagnostic (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and license details. Sent to the license holder's email by default.

to_email.description: Recipient email address for the external deliverability test

tools.name: validate_license
tools.description: Validate a SignEmail Smtp Premium license key against smtp-dkim.com. Returns activation status, domain binding, expiry date, plan type, and RSA activation signature (valid 24h).

action.description: Action to perform on the license

plans.free: Full SMTP configuration + DNS Diagnostic — unlimited, forever free
plans.multi3: $59 CAD/year — up to 3 domains (SignEmail Smtp Premium)
plans.multi5: $89 CAD/year — up to 5 domains (SignEmail Smtp Premium)
plans.lifetime: $79 CAD one-time — 1 domain, lifetime updates (SignEmail Smtp Premium)

security.smtp_password: AES-256-CBC encrypted before storage, key derived from wp-config.php SECURE_AUTH_KEY
security.dkim_private_key: AES-256-CBC encrypted, never transmitted to smtp-dkim.com, masked in admin UI
security.license_validation: Only license key + domain name transmitted to smtp-dkim.com — no credentials, no private keys
security.rsa_signing: Every active license receives an RSA-2048 signature valid 24h — DKIM cannot activate without it

wordpress.hooks: Intercepts all wp_mail() calls — WooCommerce, Contact Form 7, Gravity Forms, Elementor, BuddyPress, LearnDash

compliance.telemetry: None — no data collected beyond license key + domain for validation
